THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GILBERT, GAIL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1675 EDDY ST, #316, PLTF.
